comment.body: Stagflation persists, capping the upside and producing a range-bound market with a negative drift = low-volatility spot decay. It’s akin to February’s pattern, but stretched on the time-axis, carving a bearish wedge or pennant with its apex around the April 9–10 highs.

comment.body: i would also say if you're thinking of short call ratio spreads (i recall alma mentioned here strategy there - she uses a 2:3 ratio of long calls / short calls at higher strike).... save yourself the anxiety (and margin) by tying the short call portion off with a higher OTM debit call (so you're not taking unlimited risk)

comment.body:
Hello Alma, hello everyone,

I’d like to take this opportunity, prompted by Alma’s recent news, to let you know that I have compiled all the chat information—questions, answers, teachings, and threads that Alma has shared with us each day up to now. This includes even the jokes about her ex (of course, excluding arguments or unrelated discussions). I’ve only kept the parts where Alma corrects or adds to a classmate’s response, as well as valuable contributions made by others.

If you speak Portuguese, French, German, Spanish, or any other language, just let me know and I’d be happy to translate it for you.

comment.body:
Every evening when I return from work, I dedicate time to this task and save the content carefully. If you give me the chance, I’d love to be of service with this work. I initially mentioned this as an opportunity that Alma provides, and I want to make the most of it while also kindly asking for your support—whatever you feel in your heart to give.

The truth is, I live in LATAM, and it’s quite difficult to enter the world of trading, but I’m moving forward step by step. With this effort, I hope to continue paying for my Substack subscription, and if anything is left over, it would truly be a blessing for my wife and me.

Of course, all of this is only if Alma and all of you are willing to allow it.

Thank you very much.
